hero.eyebrow: Personal training · Nutrition · Yoga · Fascia — Zürich
hero.title: Forma by Angelina
hero.tagline: Strength, mobility and recovery — body-led training and movement in Zürich.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Four ways to feel stronger, more mobile and recovered.

personalTraining.title: Personal Training
personalTraining.description: One-on-one strength training tailored to your body and goals — for more strength, stability and confident movement.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Coaching
nutrition.description: Practical nutrition coaching that fits your life — sustainable, without rigid rules, focused on energy and well-being.

yoga.title: Yoga
yoga.description: Calm, body-led yoga for mobility, breath and awareness — a mindful counterbalance to everyday life.

physioFascia.title: Physical Therapy & Fascia Release
physioFascia.description: Targeted fascia and bodywork to release tension, support recovery and restore mobility.

about.title: About Angelina
about.bio: Angelina Bogner is a personal trainer and movement coach in Zürich. With Forma she brings together strength training, nutrition, yoga and fascia work into one body-led practice. Her approach is calm and individual: she meets you where your body is today and helps you build strength, mobility and well-being.

footer.legal: Forma by Angelina · Angelina Bogner · Zürich, Switzerland. Contact via the online booking.
